text:
「謎の木の実」を使った料理は
おかげで好評だったんだけど、いまいち
効能が高くなかったみたいなの。

だから今度もちょっと心配なんだけど
こればかりは試してみるしかないし。

無理なお願いしてるのは、わかってるけど
あなたしか頼める人がいないの。
どうかお願い

So that mysterious fruit recipe came out quite
tasty, thanks to your help. But its effects left
something to be desired.

As you can imagine, I'm a little worried about
how this one will turn out. But you don't know
until you fry, right?

I know it may be a pain, but please
understand, you're the only one I can
really ask for help. Good luck!
